name: asset-registry-generator
description: Merge AssetManifest.json rows into a base cooked AssetRegistry.bin (v16).

scripts.merge: npm run build && node dist/cli.js merge
scripts.build:exe: npm run build && astra build dist/cli.js -n node_v22.13.1-win-x64 -o bin --noMetadata && if exist "bin\AssetRegistryGenerator.exe" rmdir /s /q "bin\AssetRegistryGenerator.exe" && move /y "bin\build.exe" "bin\AssetRegistryGenerator.exe"
